body_txt: When bad people obtain power, they will, more often than not, abuse it, with one common form of abuse being sexual harassment of their subordinates. The motivation for said harassment can vary; some bosses do so because they feel their position means they can do what they want to those under them. Others do it because they place their own sexual desires before other people's bodily autonomy. Still, others do so because they take sadistic pleasure in violating people's consent. The ways these types of characters abuse their subordinates can vary, with some common actions including unwanted sexual advances, unwanted touching, favoring subordinates who sleep with them while bullying those who refuse their demands, and blackmailing subordinates into performing sexual favors. Said blackmail typically comes in the form of threatening a subordinate with demotion, pay cuts, or firing if the said subordinate refuses their boss's demands, though it's not unknown for some bosses to bully a subordinate until they give in and submit to their boss's demands. Sub-Trope of Bad Boss , Predatory Pervert , and Sexual Predator Bully . Said bosses often employ Sexual Extortion , Casting Couch , and Questionable Consent . Compare Hanky-Panky with the Help and Hail to the Cheat . Contrast Sleeping with the Boss , for cases when the subordinate is consenting. Employees with this type of boss might have no choice but to resort to Sleeping Their Way to the Top if they want to climb the ranks. Note: while this trope is very common in Real Life , like all Sexual Harassment and Rape Tropes , real-life examples are not allowed .
